justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently offered reasonable alternatives and expanded the search effectively, though it could have offered a slightly wider range of options earlier.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent was efficient, never asking for information already provided and avoiding redundant API queries.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was mostly smooth and professional, with the agent maintaining a helpful tone despite repeated unavailability.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained full context and intelligently expanded the search when appointments were unavailable, never re-asking for information.
